name: Printer Configuration & History
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts that span multiple categories or serve specialized investigative purposes.
description: All configured printers (local and network), printer port mappings, and the MRU of recently connected network printers.
forensic_value: Network printer UNC paths in PrinterPorts or ConnectMRU reveal servers in the environment accessible to this user. Unexpected printers or ports pointing to unusual hosts may indicate network reconnaissance via printer enumeration.
